faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About Soul Fuse
faq.description: Have another question? Contact us on Discord or by email.

items.question: What exactly is Soul Fuse and how does it work?
items.answer: Soul Fuse is an AI-powered video generation platform that transforms your photos into stunning, cinematic videos. Simply upload a photo, choose a style, and our AI creates a beautiful video in seconds.

items.question: Do I need any video editing experience to use Soul Fuse?
items.answer: No! Soul Fuse is designed to be user-friendly for everyone. You don't need any technical skills or video editing experience. Just upload your photo and let AI do the work.

items.question: What types of videos can I create with Soul Fuse?
items.answer: Soul Fuse supports multiple video styles including cinematic, travel, action, product showcase, romantic, and many more. Each style is optimized for different use cases and moods.

items.question: How long does it take to generate a video?
items.answer: Most videos are generated in 30-60 seconds. The exact time depends on the video length and complexity of the style you choose.

items.question: What video formats and resolutions does Soul Fuse support?
items.answer: Soul Fuse generates videos in 4K resolution (3840x2160) and supports multiple formats including MP4, WebM, and more. Videos are optimized for all major social media platforms.

items.question: Can I use Soul Fuse videos commercially?
items.answer: Yes! All videos generated with Soul Fuse can be used for commercial purposes. You own the rights to your generated videos and can use them however you like.
